text.title: Audit-Grade Code Review Checklist Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 5-step procedure to apply Audit-Grade Code Review Checklist. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: contract-conformance
step.action: Verify request/response shapes match the spec; reject undocumented breaking changes.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: secrets-and-auth
step.action: Grep for hardcoded secrets; verify auth scope on touched endpoints.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: logging-and-pii
step.action: Verify log lines do not leak PII; trace IDs present.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: tests-and-coverage
step.action: Verify new lines have tests and coverage meets target.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: evidence-log
step.action: Append the review evidence to the PR log with reviewer + timestamp.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
